offer: For accounting firms managing 10–20 clients/month, manual reconciliation causes financial discrepancies. We automate bank statement reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Inaccurate bank reconciliations leading to financial discrepancies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for accounting tools and resources
try_it: Let users try manual reconciliation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
